title: Positive Flow: Navigating to the Gallery Screen
test_steps: Open the mobile app. | Navigate to the 'Gallery' screen.
expected_result: The 'Gallery' screen is displayed with a grid of six weather widget images, each with a 'Free' label and a 'Download' button.

title: Positive Flow: Downloading a Widget
test_steps: Open the mobile app. | Navigate to the 'Gallery' screen. | Click on the 'Download' button of a weather widget.
expected_result: The selected weather widget is downloaded successfully.

title: Negative Flow: Attempting to Download a Non-Free Widget
test_steps: Open the mobile app. | Navigate to the 'Gallery' screen. | Click on the 'Download' button of a non-free weather widget.
expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that the widget is not free.

title: Boundary/Validation: Widget Image Size
test_steps: Open the mobile app. | Navigate to the 'Gallery' screen. | Observe the size of the weather widget images.
expected_result: The weather widget images have a consistent size.

title: UI Test: Header Navigation
test_steps: Open the mobile app. | Navigate to the 'Gallery' screen. | Click on the back arrow in the header.
expected_result: The user is navigated back to the previous screen.

title: Accessibility Test: Header Accessibility
test_steps: Open the mobile app. | Navigate to the 'Gallery' screen. | Perform accessibility checks on the back arrow and the title 'Cute'.
expected_result: The back arrow and the title 'Cute' are accessible.

title: Usability Test: Download Button Clickability
test_steps: Open the mobile app. | Navigate to the 'Gallery' screen. | Click on the 'Download' button of a weather widget.

title: Usability Test: Widget Image Navigation
test_steps: Open the mobile app. | Navigate to the 'Gallery' screen. | Scroll through the grid of weather widget images.
expected_result: The user can scroll through the grid of weather widget images.

title: Usability Test: Widget Image Selection
test_steps: Open the mobile app. | Navigate to the 'Gallery' screen. | Select a weather widget image by tapping on it.
expected_result: The selected weather widget image is highlighted.
